primary_candidate: Zhu et al. 2025, Computers and Geotechnics 188:107620
why_it_matters: Zhu et al. 2025 is a second independent fines-loss family because it reports a probabilistic model validated against four suffusion experiments.

verified_sources.evidence_used: article identity, DOI, abstract-level validation statement, authorship, and data-curation metadata
metadata confirmation only; no numeric residual data used

claim_boundary: The current local package has metadata and abstract-level evidence only. It cannot claim second-family residual validation until numeric tables, supplemental data or digitized curves are acquired and audited.
